'''âv-m-d''' ('''kavamad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mace|mace]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mace|mace]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| kavamad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamad|thivamad]] || [[word:jivamad|jivamad]] || [[word:shivamad|shivamad]] || [[word:kivamad|kivamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamad|thuthuvamad]] || [[word:jujuvamad|jujuvamad]] || [[word:shushuvamad|shushuvamad]] || [[word:kukuvamad|kukuvamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvamad|thuvamad]] || [[word:juvamad|juvamad]] || [[word:shuvamad|shuvamad]] || [[word:kuvamad|kuvamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamad|thuvamad]] || [[word:juvamad|juvamad]] || [[word:shuvamad|shuvamad]] || [[word:kuvamad|kuvamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevamad|thevamad]] || [[word:jevamad|jevamad]] || [[word:shevamad|shevamad]] || [[word:kevamad|kevamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovamad|thothovamad]] || [[word:jojovamad|jojovamad]] || [[word:shoshovamad|shoshovamad]] || [[word:kokovamad|kokovamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovamad|thovamad]] || [[word:jovamad|jovamad]] || [[word:shovamad|shovamad]] || [[word:kovamad|kovamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovamad|thovamad]] || [[word:jovamad|jovamad]] || [[word:shovamad|shovamad]] || [[word:kovamad|kovamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvamad|thĂŠvamad]] || [[word:jĂŠvamad|jĂŠvamad]] || [[word:shĂŠvamad|shĂŠvamad]] || [[word:kĂŠvamad|kĂŠvamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamad|thathavamad]] || [[word:jajavamad|jajavamad]] || [[word:shashavamad|shashavamad]] || [[word:kakavamad|kakavamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamad|thavamad]] || [[word:javamad|javamad]] || [[word:shavamad|shavamad]] || [[word:kavamad|kavamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavamad|thavamad]] || [[word:javamad|javamad]] || [[word:shavamad|shavamad]] || [[word:kavamad|kavamad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavamad|shavamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavamad|goshavamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavamad|gokishavamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavamadnĂŒ|shavamadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavamadnknĂŒ|goshavamadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamadnĂŒ|gokishavamadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavamadshĂ«|shavamadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavamadnkshĂ«|goshavamadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavamadshĂ«|gokishavamadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamadro|shavamadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamadnkro|goshavamadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamadro|gokishavamadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamadmu|shavamadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamadnkmu|goshavamadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamadmu|gokishavamadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavamadsher|shavamadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavamadnksher|goshavamadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavamadsher|gokishavamadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavamadng|shavamadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavamadnkng|goshavamadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavamadng|gokishavamadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavamadya|shavamadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavamadnkya|goshavamadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavamadya|gokishavamadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavamadyam|shavamadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavamadnkyam|goshavamadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavamadyam|gokishavamadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamadnĂŒshĂ«|shavamadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavamadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavamadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamadnĂŒro|shavamadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamadnknĂŒro|goshavamadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamadnĂŒro|gokishavamadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamadnĂŒmu|shavamadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamadnknĂŒmu|goshavamadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamadnĂŒmu|gokishavamadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamadshĂ«nĂŒ|shavamadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavamadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavamadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamadshĂ«ro|shavamadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamadnkshĂ«ro|goshavamadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamadshĂ«ro|gokishavamadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamadshĂ«mu|shavamadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamadnkshĂ«mu|goshavamadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamadshĂ«mu|gokishavamadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamadronĂŒ|shavamadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamadnkronĂŒ|goshavamadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamadronĂŒ|gokishavamadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamadroshĂ«|shavamadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamadnkroshĂ«|goshavamadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamadroshĂ«|gokishavamadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamadromu|shavamadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamadnkromu|goshavamadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamadromu|gokishavamadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamadmunĂŒ|shavamadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamadnkmunĂŒ|goshavamadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamadmunĂŒ|gokishavamadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamadmushĂ«|shavamadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamadnkmushĂ«|goshavamadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamadmushĂ«|gokishavamadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamadmuro|shavamadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamadnkmuro|goshavamadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamadmuro|gokishavamadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
